title: Five Nights at Freddy's: Management Wanted | FNAF MW
description: Brings the world of Five Nights at Freddy's into Minecraft!
body: [![Forge Affiliation Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/banner/console-affiliation-banners/banner_3a118337-c7d7-4657-abdc-ca89fb5e88ae.png)](https://ovdr.org/bisect) ![](https://cdn.chrisarrived.com/mw/mod-pages/HelpyBanner.png) ## Welcome to Five Nights at Freddy's: Management Wanted! *** ### Five Nights at Freddy’s: Management Wanted is a Minecraft Mod that merges the pizzeria simulator mechanics of Freddy Fazbear’s Pizzeria Simulator (FFPS) with the RPG Adventure of FNaF World. ## Step into the Fazbear Management Simulator! Learn how to run a successful pizzeria, all from your computer! * **Design, Build, and Maintain** your own Restaurant!   * **Customize** your pizzeria with **unique decorations and animatronics!**  * Choose from over **150+ Animatronics!**    ## The Night is unforgiving, stay sharp and use every tool at your disposal to survive to 6 AM! * Monitor [Security Cameras](https://modrinth.com/mod/surveillance-package) to track the movement of these mechanical threats!   * Use Doors, Lights, Masks, and Audio Lures to keep the monsters at bay!   * Keep your wits and keep your distance, for your sake.   *** ## **RELATED MODS & SOCIALS** *****(Click on an image to open the link in a new tab)***** [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1027040/description_28102e83-04fd-482c-9529-fee7c50ffd8e.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/management-wanted-more-decor)[![](https://cdn.chrisarrived.com/mw/mod-pages/SP-banner.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/surveillance-package) [![](https://cdn.chrisarrived.com/mw/mod-pages/discord-btn.png)](https://discord.gg/ovdr)   [![](https://cdn.chrisarrived.com/mw/mod-pages/youtube-btn.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@ManagementWanted)   [![](https://cdn.chrisarrived.com/mw/mod-pages/geckolib-btn.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) *** 🎧Support our musicians and click **[here](https://mwsound.team/)** to listen to our music!🎧 🤝 Watch community made videos on our mod [__**here!**__](https://fnafmw.com/playlists/community) *(We love seeing your stuff! :D)* 🤝 🐦 Follow our **[Twitter](https://x.com/intent/follow?screen_name=fnafmw)** & **[Discord](https://discord.com/invite/ovdr)** to stay up to date with everything FNAF:MW! 🟪 Made by [OVDR Studios](https://ovdrstudios.com/) | Support us and get exclusive perks by clicking **[here](https://ovdr.org/donate)**! *FNAF: Management Wanted is not affiliated with Scott Cawthon or Steel Wool Studios.* ***
